title: Master Memory Bank
purpose: Back-up repository for all agent personal memory, Project Context Protocol entries, and all threads, regardless of provider.

contents.name: agent_memory
contents.description: Personal memory graphs for each agent, auto-updated as locally stored ones are created and updated

contents.name: specialty_memory
contents.description: Specialty-specific memory graphs — ai_engineer, family_doctor, investment_stratagist, os_expert

contents.name: thread_mgmt
contents.description: Raw threads stored by provider — claude, gemini, ollama
